jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at HomeTown
jsonLd.description:
We at HomeTown are looking for an experienced Store Manager based out of Vadodara. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About HomeTown:
HomeTown is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeTown!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
